llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Intern, Communication(001992)
job.description: Main Tasks Support marketing team on communication projects. 1) support to edit WeChat post; 2)support to prepare product brochures; 3) support to organize public expos such as booth preparation, live stream etc. Main Requirements 1) good communication skills; 2) good English and Chinese writing skills; 3) good sense of designing; 4) basic knowledge of chemistry and chemical products 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
